overall.description: A smooth first-person walk through a modern urban plaza at night, featuring wet reflective pavement, illuminated glass towers, and digital billboards. The scene transitions from an escalator entrance through tree-lined walkways to a stairway plaza, with neon lights reflecting off the rain-slicked ground.

events.description: moves from covered escalator area into open tree-lined pedestrian plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet pavement, passing the escalator structure on the left

modern glass roof structure with purple neon lighting underneath
outdoor escalator with metal sides and glass panels
raised planter with mature trees and green shrubs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a modern escalator entrance with glass canopy structures. The camera moves forward along wet reflective pavement, transitioning from the semi-covered entrance into an open tree-lined pedestrian plaza. The area is illuminated by ambient city lights and building illumination, with no visible pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian promenade with digital billboards

events.description: yellow taxi passes by on the adjacent road to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing straight along the plaza walkway, passing green benches and tree planters

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past on the adjacent street

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying red and pink graphics on building facade
modern building with 'AVANT' signage and vertical architectural details
tall modern office building with curved glass facade and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a tree-lined pedestrian promenade with green benches lining the path. A prominent red digital billboard illuminates the right side of the frame, while the AVANT building and curved glass towers rise in the background. A yellow taxi passes on the adjacent road, and the wet pavement reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight pedestrian walkway with benches and glass towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long straight plaza path between tree planters and benches

entered.detail: modern green and yellow benches lining the walkway
large digital billboard suspended over the walkway ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a long straight section of the pedestrian plaza, flanked by modern benches and mature trees in planters. The curved glass tower dominates the right side with its illuminated windows, while the path leads toward an overhead digital screen visible in the distance. The wet pavement continues to reflect the surrounding city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza intersection with stairway and escalator access

events.description: approaching stairway plaza with multiple levels and escalator access

agents.ego_description: slowing slightly while approaching the stairway plaza, surveying the intersection of walkways

entered.detail: multi-level plaza area with concrete stairs and escalator access
outdoor escalator with illuminated sides leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a multi-level plaza intersection featuring stairways and escalator access. The spatial layout becomes more complex with multiple pathways converging. The surrounding glass towers continue to illuminate the scene with artificial light, while the wet pavement reflects the overhead digital signage and building lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered transit entrance into an expansive, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins beneath the glass canopy of a modern escalator entrance, gliding forward across wet reflective pavement as the space opens into a tree-lined pedestrian promenade. As the camera advances, the environment becomes more vibrant with the glow of a red digital billboard and the towering presence of the AVANT building, while a yellow taxi passes by on the adjacent road. The scene then extends along a straight path flanked by green benches and mature trees, with the illuminated windows of a curved glass tower dominating the right side of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches a complex multi-level intersection where various stairways and escalator access points converge under the shimmering reflections of overhead digital signage.
